<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/points/delete"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete a function by deviceId, endpointId, and functionCode.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[]}

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code"}},"title":"DeleteDevicePointRequest"},"examples":{"deleteDevicePoint":{"value":{"deviceId":"device-001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
